description: Host CPU profiling matrix. Runs against the dev server when no GPU is detected. Excludes DFlash drafter pairings (CPU-only inference doesn't benefit from speculative decoding when the drafter shares the same NEON/AVX kernels) and the 1-bit QJL config (kernel not yet on host).

prompts.text: What is the capital of France?
Explain in three sentences why the sky is blue.
